# CTFontOrientation.horizontal

**Case**

The horizontal orientation.

## Declaration

```swift
case horizontal
```

## Font Orientations

- **CTFontOrientation.default**: The native orientation of the font.
- **CTFontOrientation.vertical**: The vertical orientation.
